content:
Update April 26th

The Finals are set! Here are the ESC teams competing for Edmonton division supremacy for the 2018/19 season. Play begins at 10 AM and wraps up around 6 PM with all matches taking place at the ESC.

Div 1 Mixed: The Bagel Factory

Div 2 Mixed: Squashaholics and Don’t Drink and Drive

Div 6 Mixed: ESC Rock Pile

Div 3 Women: Squashed Like A Bug

The ESL Interclub season is now on to the playoff stage, with first and second round matches happening these next two weeks with the finals on April 26th at the ESC. Good luck to all our ESC teams taking part in this year’s playoffs!

Mixed Level 1

  • Studs
  • The Bagel Factory
  • Mike Drop

Mixed Level 2

  • C Bombs
  • Fat & Furious
  • Squashaholics
  • Don’t Drink and Drive

Women’s Level 2

  • Cross Courts

Mixed Level 3

  • MidCourt Crisis

Women’s Level 3

  • Squashed Like A Bug

Mixed Level 4

  • Tee Wrecks
  • ^5

Mixed Level 5

  • Chicken Legs
  • Eradicators

Mixed Level 6

  • Rock Pile
  • The Strokes
  • We Signed Up For Racketball

Mixed Level 7

  • The Side Outs
